problem.title: THE PROBLEM
problem.body: AI conversations are ephemeral. Power users lose context, insights, and continuity across sessions. Multi-agent workflows lack a shared memory layer for AI-native workflows.

solution.title: THE SOLUTION
solution.body: VIKI captures, compresses, and semantically indexes every AI interaction — enabling permanent context, searchable history, and multi-modal capture over time. Self-hosted, multi-modal, enterprise-grade.

items.name: Self-Hosting Privacy
items.description: Data never leaves your infrastructure. WebAuthn passkey auth. GDPR/SOC 2 ready.

items.name: Multi-Modal Capture
items.description: Video, audio, text simultaneously. Rewind MemoryVault integration. AVIF thumbnails + GIF previews.

items.name: Medallion Architecture
items.description: Bronze/Silver/Gold ADLS Gen2 layers. Parquet + Zstd. 90-day retention Bronze, analytics-ready Gold.

items.name: HNSW Vector Search
items.description: Semantic retrieval via Azure Cognitive Search with text-embedding-3-large. Hybrid search: vector + text.

items.name: Formation Backfill
items.description: 14-agent, 4-squadron, 3-wave formation. 66,538+ records ingested in single run. CCEM APM telemetry.

items.name: Native Apps
items.description: VikiAgent (Swift/AppKit). Phoenix LiveView dashboards. Resource throttle + formation monitor.

items.name: AG-UI Protocol
items.description: Real-time agent telemetry via AG-UI SSE. Formation progress, wave tracking, CCEM APM integration.

items.name: claude-mem Integration
items.description: claude-mem v10.4.3: 5,487 observations, 47 sessions, 45 summaries. Semantic search via FTS5 + Chroma.

wave_1: Foundation: VIKI Interface WebGL cube, MediaTextureManager, Azure Speech integration, landscape tile layout, video loop textures, and tile cache endpoint. Three.js + Phoenix LiveView.
wave_2: Speech & Avatar: I,Robot shader compositing, Phoenix TTS controller (Azure Neural), WebAudio face-glow speech playback, Neural Avatar synthesis pipeline, holographic overlay panel.
wave_3: Auth & Settings: WebAuthn passkey registration + authentication (wax_ library), settings LiveView with DB persistence, OSYJ unlimited events, VikiAgent OTP bridge + token redeem.
wave_4: VikiAgent Native: Deep-link vikiagent:// URL scheme, passkey authenticate flow, ResourceMode CPU/RAM throttle, Formation Status Poller, rich ASCII formation menu.
wave_5: Backfill Formation: fmt-20260329-viki-backfill-001 — 14 agents, 4 squadrons, 3 waves. 66,538+ records ingested. 331,051 total rows in viki_conversations.db. 170-day temporal coverage (2025-10-08 to 2026-03-30).
